#AiArtCommunity #digitalart #AiArt #aidigitalart #goodbye #couples #ending #remixratpack #surrealart #3D #design #INSTAGRAM #classic #cool #portrait #openai #AiCommunity #AiArtChallenge #SynthArt #CreativeAi #Ai #AiArtwork #qp prompt in ALT

embed.alt: A quiet, cinematic 15-second dramatic scene intercut between two separate apartments at dusk: a woman stands by a window in a softly lit living room with city lights outside, while a man sits on the edge of an unmade bed in his apartment across town, both holding phones to their ears. Natural interior lighting with warm lamps and cool window light, shallow depth of field, subtle handheld realism, soft film grain. The woman says, “I didn’t think this would be the moment.” Cut to the man: “Me neither.” She asks, “Are you ready?” He answers after a short beat, “No. But I’m going anyway.” A pause hangs. She exhales, “Okay… bye.” After a brief silence, he replies quietly, “Bye.”

A quiet, cinematic 15-second dramatic scene intercut between two separate apartments at dusk: a woman stands by a window in a softly lit living room with city lights outside, while a man sits on the edge of an unmade bed in his apartment across town, both holding phones to their ears. The woman says, “I didn’t think this would be the moment.” Cut to the man: “Me neither.” She asks, “Are you ready?” He answers after a short beat, “No. But I’m going anyway.” A pause hangs. She exhales, “Okay… bye.” After a brief silence, he replies quietly, “Bye.”

value.text:
突然アイディアが降りてきたので、
新キャラ作成しました。
お見知りおきを…٩(๑˃ ᵕ ˂ )و

名前：白鷺 赤禰(しらさぎ あかね)

見た目：
髪は純白。目は黄色く星の煌めきが映る。

年齢：不詳

性別：女性…？

種族：人間…？

性格：
礼儀正しく優しいが、
どこか作られた感じが漂う謎の女性。

キャラ背景：
いつも制服を着ているが、
誰も本当の年齢を知らない。
夜な夜などこかにフラフラと入り込み、
とんでもない事をしてると噂されている。
真相は誰も知らない。

#AIイラスト #OC #AIart #AI_Illustration

record.text:
そういう事です…
でもファッションがカッコイイので、
「エロかっこいい」なのです( *˙ω˙*)و

ボディラインがしっかりわかって、
黒ストってのはエロかっこいいですぞ…
